overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1217 layer, assign Release 1218, and load bounded room-density scenery
Add room-scoped parser-kindness responses for nouns explicitly advertised by existing prose

preserved_canonical_state: every selected noun is room-scoped PSEUDO scenery rather than a portable object
existing room exits and conditional blockers remain authoritative
entering established openings delegates to existing directional travel
no new object, score, treasure, combat, timer, or puzzle state is introduced
the existing Studio door pseudo remains authoritative while advertised paint vocabulary gains bounded responses
Release 1217 material consequences and all earlier layers remain unchanged
excluded_scope: new hidden passages, treasure, score, or alternate solutions
broad room rewrite or prose replacement
